landing.feature1Title: Find fans who are willing to go the extra mile for your content!
landing.feature1Desc: Every bit of your passion deserves care. Start your professional creator monetization journey today.
landing.feature2Title: Data encryption and privacy protection — we care more than you do.
landing.feature2Desc: Built with high-grade security architecture to ensure your transactions and personal data are 100% protected.

landing.feature4Title: Create freely, just be your most authentic self

faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Join AiQan
faq.a1: Click the Subscribe button on a creator's page. Supports monthly plans or single-post unlocks.
faq.a2: Go to Settings → Subscription Management to cancel. Takes effect at the next billing cycle; no refund for the current period.
faq.a3: We support credit cards, LINE Pay, JKoPay, and convenience store payments (7-11, FamilyMart).
faq.a4: Allow 1–2 business days for convenience store payments to be confirmed. Your subscription activates automatically once confirmed.
faq.q5: Benefits of joining as a user
faq.a5: Follow creators for free, browse public content, unlock paid content with a subscription, and send tips.
faq.a6: Check your internet connection. If the problem persists, try a different browser or clear your cache.
faq.a7: All users must maintain respectful conduct. Harassment, discrimination, or abusive language may result in account suspension.
faq.a8: Go to Settings → Become a Creator, fill in the application, and wait 3–5 business days for approval. Once approved, you can publish paid content.
faq.a9: Publish public or paid content, earn 80% revenue share, and use creator tools like DMs and user blocking.
faq.a10: Supported formats: JPG / PNG / MP4. Max file size: 500MB. Ensure a stable connection before retrying.
faq.q11: 80/20 revenue split with no payment processing fee
faq.a11: Creators keep 80% of each transaction. AiQan takes 20% as a service fee with no additional payment processing charges.
faq.q12: When do creators receive their payout
faq.a12: Payouts are processed monthly and deposited by the 15th of the following month. Minimum withdrawal: NT$500.
faq.a13: Creators can block users to prevent subscriptions or DMs. Users can also block each other.
